title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings for downloading, running, and chatting with Llama-2, Mistral, Gemma, and other GGUF models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK that wraps the Ollama REST API for easy model loading, chat, and embeddings in Python scripts.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers to interact with a local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package adding Ollama support to LangChain as a local LLM wrapper for chains, agents, and RAG.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web interface that connects to a local Ollama instance; no data leaves your machine.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client library published to Maven Central for integrating Ollama into JVM applications.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community Ruby gem that exposes a fluent interface to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust-based CLI that wraps Ollama with extra utilities like prompt templating and batch inference.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use any Ollama model as a Generator or Embedder in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-codellama
summary: Official guide and helper scripts for importing CodeLlama (and other HF models) into Ollama’s GGUF format.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-affinity and horizontal scaling options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official multi-arch Docker images (cpu/cuda/rocm) published to Docker Hub for running Ollama in containers.

title: ollama-chat-gradle
summary: Gradle plugin that spins up an Ollama service during integration tests and injects chat endpoints.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI that talks to Ollama over REST, featuring markdown, LaTeX, and session memory.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector store and LangChain retrieval QA.

title: ollama-nestjs
summary: NestJS module that exposes Ollama as an injectable service with RxJS streaming for server-sent events.

title: ollama-deno
summary: Third-party Deno module ported from ollama-js, installable via deno.land/x for TypeScript-first projects.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community .NET SDK (NuGet) providing strongly-typed clients for chat, embeddings, and model management.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into threads with slash-command support.
